title: Archeries
description: Arrows, bows, and crossbows are good, but why not more?
body:
# Archeries
### **Arrows, bows, and crossbows are good, but why not more?**

This mod add a few unique arrows, bows, and crossbows. Avaiable for NeoForge & Fabric/Quilt. 

This mod introduces **tiered bow** & **tiered crossbow** that can be upgraded in tiers (copper, iron, golden, diamond, and netherite) and adding new bow and crossbow types:

- **Longbow**: A longer bow allowing the arrow to be faster but take more time to draw. Can be upgraded.

- **Heavy Crossbow**: A heavy crossbow for a much higher arrow speed but overall longer charge time. Can be upgraded. Does not support fireworks.

- **Wristbow**: A lighter crossbow that is focused in the off-hand trading overall firepower with charging speed. Reloading this weapon in the main-hand increase the reload speed significantly. While in the off-hand and charged, this weapon will be "hidden" and you can't use it while it is hidden. Press R (keybind in settings under Gameplay section) to use it (aim). Can be upgraded but does. Does not support fireworks.

New bows and crossbows have a unique stats than their vanilla counterpart, their stat can be seen with advance tooltip on.

Along with adding new arrows:

- **Explosive Arrow**: Explode shortly on impact
- **Copper Arrow**: Attract lighting even when it's not thunder
- **Soft Arrow**: Reduced volume by ~95% and does not cause any vibration (great for Deep Dark/silent exploration)
- **Tracer Arrow**: Produce glowing particle around it and while igniting itself (essentially flamed arrow)
- **Echoing Arrow**: Can reset warden anger issue to you. Additionally disorient and weaken entities that is hit with this.
- **Wind-Charged Arrow**: Stronger Wind Charge (Recommended crossbow with multishot and an elytra)

## FAQ
1. Can I use it for my modpack?
   > Yes! Feel free to put this mod in your modpack, but still, provide credit by providing a link to this Modrinth mod page.
2. Can I contribute to this mod/project?
   > Not currently open to contributions. Maybe next time.
3. Update to `x` version / add new feature?
   > I'll do it when I can and when I want to. No promises.

**Note: This mod mainly develop and tested in Fabric, NeoForge is not tested entirely and can _maybe_ broken.**
